# TiledStyleDefinition.TypeTagTiledWindowPieces field

`TypeHash("TiledWindowPieces")` — the alternate composition variant (observed on `BagBackground` 603760). Its trailing layout differs from [`TypeTagNSlice`](./TypeTagNSlice.md); the tile-flag fields are left undecoded ([`HasPartialDecode`](./HasPartialDecode.md) = `true`).
